title: EVA characters in other series
wikitext:
[]: EVA characters in other series.             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Sun Jul 22, 2012 9:26 pm A topic for discussing certain characters crossing over into other series and how they would get along with the characters from said series. Or what kind of events would take place. I'l start the thread of with my idea. What if Shinji, Rei and Asuka had to live with The Simpsons? I reckon it would be interesting how the three EVA kids and their certain problems would get along with the disfunctional family and there personalitys. Especially Homer's.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Mon Jul 23, 2012 5:42 am Homer: Oh! You pilot a giant purple robot? Cool! Shinji: No, it isn´t cool, it´s...(is he even listening?) Homer: Piloting giant robot

[]:             Quote Post by ssguy » Mon Jul 23, 2012 9:31 am Phineas and Ferb with Pen Pen as Ferb and Keele as Doofensmchirtz. It just works too well to be a coincedence.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Tue Jul 24, 2012 12:55 am Totally picturing Mr. Burns and Commander Ikari sitting side by side, both assuming the Gendo pose and muttering the word Excellent.

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Tue Jul 24, 2012 3:46 pm Hm. Let's toss Shinji into Meg's place on Family Guy.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Jul 24, 2012 8:13 pm SaVaGe wrote: Hm. Let's toss Shinji into Meg's place on Family Guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Jul 25, 2012 9:09 am I kind of hate myself for saying this but... The children (and possibly other characters) Getting transferred to Yamaku Academy (Katawa Shoujo) I would find it interesting, the children pondering on their experiences and life at Yamaku compared to their lives in NERV/NGE. And of course, how they would (or wouldn't) Get along with the students of Yamaku.

[]:             Quote Post by Love Not Given Lightly » Wed Jul 25, 2012 10:57 am I want to see Gendo as an antagonist for..... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed Jul 25, 2012 12:56 pm Love Not Given Lightly wrote: I want to see Gendo as an antagonist for..... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Wed Jul 25, 2012 4:23 pm I picture Shinji, with a device, charging a magical attack against Nanoha Takamachi after Force. Nanoha; Starlight... Shinji; No sell. SPREAD ZERO. *Shinji fires the Rebuild beams as his device shaped like the Lance in Rebuild mutters in Kaworu's voice "Yes sir" Nanoha; Oh shi... *BOOM And then Gendo and Jail Scaglietti sharing a cell. Gendo; So what did you do? Jail; I tried initiating a terrorist syndicate. Gendo; I tried to turn earth into tang. Jail; Ok, no comments whatsoever.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Thu Jul 26, 2012 7:08 am Gendo as Kyubey in Mahou Shoujo Madoka Magica.

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Thu Jul 26, 2012 7:01 pm driftking18594 wrote: Gendo as Kyubey in Mahou Shoujo Madoka Magica.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:06 am StratoSakuya...AF wrote: Or Kaworu...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 28, 2012 3:23 am Related http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12013/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/115/Awesomely-Ridiculous-Eva-Crossover-Ideas/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8626/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8487/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7902/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7866/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7564/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/2200/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/5261/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/4544/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/2949/
